description: Initialize Next.js 15 project with TypeScript, App Router, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, and core project structure. Set up the design system (colors, typography, spacing), global styles, font loading, and the foundational layout including custom cursor, smooth scrolling setup, and base animation utilities.
steps: Initialize Next.js 15 project with TypeScript and App Router in /projects/sandbox/cocc using: npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --app --eslint --src-dir=false --import-alias='@/*' --use-npm. If directory not empty, handle appropriately.
Install dependencies: gsap (with ScrollTrigger, ScrollSmoother plugins via @gsap/react or direct), and any other needed packages

Set up Tailwind CSS config with the design system: colors (#FFFFFF background, #000000 primary text, #050FA3 accent), luxury typography scale with massive editorial sizes (8xl-[12vw] range), spacing system

Create global CSS in app/globals.css with: CSS custom properties for the design system, smooth scroll behavior, base typography styles using a premium sans-serif font (Inter or similar from Google Fonts), selection colors, scrollbar styling
Create app/layout.tsx as the root layout with: metadata (title, description, OG tags for CACOYANNIS LIMITED), font loading via next/font, body wrapper with smooth scroll container
Create lib/animations.ts with GSAP utility functions: character reveal (SplitText-style), word reveal, fade up, stagger animations, magnetic button effect helper, parallax helper

Create components/CustomCursor.tsx: custom cursor with follower dot, magnetic interactions on hover targets, smooth GSAP-powered movement, scale changes on interactive elements, blend mode for contrast
Create components/PageTransition.tsx: cinematic page transition wrapper using GSAP for route changes with overlay animation
Create components/SmoothScroll.tsx: Lenis or native smooth scroll wrapper that integrates with GSAP ScrollTrigger
Create a basic app/page.tsx placeholder that confirms the setup works with a simple heading styled with the design system
Verify: npm run build passes and npm run lint passes
acceptance_criteria: npm run build completes successfully with zero errors
npm run lint passes with no errors
Design system colors and typography are properly configured in Tailwind
GSAP is installed and animation utilities are exported from lib/animations.ts
Custom cursor component exists and uses GSAP for smooth movement
Root layout includes proper metadata for CACOYANNIS LIMITED
Global styles include the luxury aesthetic (white background, black text, accent color)
findings: Project initialized manually (not via create-next-app) due to existing .git and .agents directories. Used Next.js 15.5.18, Tailwind CSS v4 with @tailwindcss/postcss, gsap 3.12.x. Tailwind v4 uses @theme directive in CSS instead of tailwind.config.js. ESLint uses flat config (eslint.config.mjs). Build and lint pass cleanly. next-env.d.ts is listed in .gitignore by default in newer Next.js but we include it for type support.
